title: Is there a difference between --binary option and the old --exe option?
body:
Hi,
It seems my old code works with --exe option.
But once I switch to --binary option, there is a "multi main define" error:

_/usr/bin/ld: Vtop__ALL.a(Vtop__ALL.o): in function `main':
Vtop__ALL.cpp:(.text.startup+0x0): multiple definition of `main'; tb.o:tb.cpp:(.text.startup+0x0): first defined here_

below is my cmd:
_verilator -Wall --trace -cc -sv --binary -CFLAGS $(CPP_ARG) -CFLAGS $(I_ARG_C_SRC_DIR) tb.cpp $(MODULE).sv $(I_ARG_VLG_SRC_DIR)_ 

once --binary switched to --exe, error will be gone:
